title: Tin Can Opener Manual, UHIYEE Upgrade Stainless Steel Can Openers That Work with Soft Grips Sharp Cutting Blades, Heavy Duty Tin Openers for Arthritis Hands with Magnetic Lid Lifter, Black
features: Durable Dual-Layer Steel Build – Built with a reinforced stainless steel body and a hardened 420J2 cutting blade, this handheld can opener designed to cut smoothly and withstand years of daily.
No Skipping, No Mess – Precision gear mechanism ensures a steady, skip-free cut, no jagged edges, no hassle, just a smooth edge.
Comfort-Grip Handles – Soft, ergonomic handles provide a secure and cushioned grip that fits comfortably in your hand, reducing strain.
Effortless Turning Knob – Large and easy to twist, the knob reduces hand fatigue, perfect for seniors or anyone with limited strength.
Magnetic Lid Lifter – A smart side magnet lifts the lid after cutting, no need to touch it, keeping hands clean and your countertop mess-free.
Built-In Bottle Opener – Includes a convenient bottle opener built into the head, pop open soda, beer, or juice with ease.
The UHIYEE Assurance - Backed by UHIYEE’s one-year replacement promise—if anything goes wrong, we’ll make it right.
description: Product Description Hardened steel gear and durable dual-layer steel head ensure smooth operation and long-lasting durability. There is an integrated magnet that helps lift lids off for safe and easy disposal. Eliminate the risk of cutting your hands. Features an integrated bottle opener on the side to help you quickly pop open your beverage.
